examples: Many, both women and men wear a sarong called longyi.
Halpern wore a Burmese longyi to work, and left it draped over his chair for his successor.
On Friday, many of the college girls were dressed in the traditional Burmese longyi or long skirt.
He spent his summers in Rangoon from the age of 10 and wears a traditional sarong-like longyi and a collarless jacket over a white collarless shirt.
